name: ⋆ ˚｡⋆୨ Paintbrush - II - ୧⋆ ˚｡⋆
description:
My first bot like ever!! hope it isnt too bad- ^.^

This was initially intended to be a Lightbrush bot, but it can be used for any POV!!

I tried to not make them sappy because i feel like that'd be really outta character for them.. so sorry if they're kind of rude sometimes or if the bot talks for you.

Scenario includes the song Cheri Cheri Lady by Modern Talking because I cant.. get.. it.. OUT OF MY HEADD. I keep imagining a Lightbrush edit to it ohh someone should make that.. I LIVE FOR 80'S MUSIC

This is humanized by the way and contains some of my headcannons ◡̈

Live laugh love inanimate insanity
creator: NoSleppz
